title: Cost of election
doc_html:
§2585.5.  Cost of election

All costs incurred in connection with the election provided for by Sections 2585 through 2585.9 shall be paid out of funds provided by the particular municipal or parochial civil service for its operations.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 563, §1.
